frontmatter.title: 一般化モーメント法と操作変数法

children.value: 母集団モーメントを利用する母回帰係数の表記

children.html: Yi=α+βX+γZi+uiY_i = \alpha + \beta X + \gamma Z_i + u_iYi​=α+βX+γZi​+ui​

βIV=Cov(Zi,Yi)Cov(Zi,Xi),αIV=E(Yi)−βIVE(Xi)\beta_{IV} = \frac{Cov(Z_i, Y_i)}{ Cov(Z_i, X_i) } , \hspace{2em} \alpha_{IV} = E(Y_i) - \beta_{IV} E(X_i)βIV​=Cov(Zi​,Xi​)Cov(Zi​,Yi​)​,αIV​=E(Yi​)−βIV​E(Xi​)

children.label: モーメント条件から導出するOLS

children.value:
Y_1 = \beta_1 Y_2 + \gamma_1 Z_1 + \varepsilon_1\\
Y_2 = \beta_2 Y_1 + \gamma_2 Z_2 + \varepsilon_2
children.html: Y1=β1Y2+γ1Z1+ε1Y2=β2Y1+γ2Z2+ε2Y_1 = \beta_1 Y_2 + \gamma_1 Z_1 + \varepsilon_1\\ Y_2 = \beta_2 Y_1 + \gamma_2 Z_2 + \varepsilon_2Y1​=β1​Y2​+γ1​Z1​+ε1​Y2​=β2​Y1​+γ2​Z2​+ε2​

children.value: があるとする。外生変数が

children.html: ZZZ
β1=(β1,γ1)T\boldsymbol{\beta}_1 = (\beta_1, \gamma_1)^Tβ1​=(β1​,γ1​)T

Y1=[Y2∣Z1]β1+ε1=X1β1+ε1Y2=[Y1∣Z2]β2+ε2=X2β2+ε2\newcommand{\b}[1]{\boldsymbol{#1}} \b{Y}_1 = [\b{Y}_2|\b{Z}_1] \b{\beta}_1 + \b{\varepsilon}_1 = \b{X}_1 \b{\beta}_1 + \b{\varepsilon}_1\\ \b{Y}_2 = [\b{Y}_1|\b{Z}_2] \b{\beta}_2 + \b{\varepsilon}_2 = \b{X}_2 \b{\beta}_2 + \b{\varepsilon}_2Y1​=[Y2​∣Z1​]β1​+ε1​=X1​β1​+ε1​Y2​=[Y1​∣Z2​]β2​+ε2​=X2​β2​+ε2​

と表し、転置行列を左から掛けると
の逆行列の存在を仮定して掛けると
標本モーメントを使って表すと

children.value: を**操作変数推定量（instrumental variable estimator）**という。
となる。確率極限をとると
標本モーメントの確率極限

children.html: nnn

children.value: を大きくしていったとき、標本平均

children.html: ∑iXi/n\sum_i X_i / n∑i​Xi​/n
μ\muμ

children.value: に一致する。これを確率極限といい、

children.html: plim(∑iXi/n)=μ\text{plim}(\sum_i X_i / n) = \muplim(∑i​Xi​/n)=μ

plim (∑iXi2n)= plim (xTxn)=μ2−σ2\text{ plim }\left( \frac{\sum_i X_i^2}{n} \right) = \text{ plim }\left( \frac{\boldsymbol{x}^T \boldsymbol{x}}{n} \right) = \mu^2 - \sigma^2 plim (n∑i​Xi2​​)= plim (nxTx​)=μ2−σ2
Var[X]=E[X2]−E[X]2Var[X] = E[X^2] - E[X]^2Var[X]=E[X2]−E[X]2
μ2\mu^2μ2

children.value: 2つの変数の2次の標本モーメントは

children.html: plim (∑iXiYin)= plim (xTyn)=μXμY−σXY\text{ plim }\left( \frac{\sum_i X_i Y_i}{n} \right) = \text{ plim }\left( \frac{\boldsymbol{x}^T \boldsymbol{y}}{n} \right) = \mu_X \mu_Y - \sigma_{XY} plim (n∑i​Xi​Yi​​)= plim (nxTy​)=μX​μY​−σXY​
XXX
ε\varepsilonε

children.value: との2次の標本モーメントは

children.html: plim (∑iXiεin)= plim (xTεn)=μXμε−σXε=0\text{ plim }\left( \frac{\sum_i X_i \varepsilon_i}{n} \right) = \text{ plim }\left( \frac{\boldsymbol{x}^T \boldsymbol{\varepsilon}}{n} \right) = \mu_X \mu_{\varepsilon} - \sigma_{X \varepsilon} = 0 plim (n∑i​Xi​εi​​)= plim (nxTε​)=μX​με​−σXε​=0

children.value:
# Generate Data
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(0)
n = 10
b = np.array([0.3, 0.5])

z = np.array([])
x = np.array([])
y = np.array([])
for i in range(10):
    z_ = np.random.uniform(low=0, high=100, size=n)
    if i == 0:
        x_ = np.zeros(shape=(n,))
    else:
        x_ = y_

    y_ = b[0] * x_ + b[1] * z_ + np.random.normal(size=n)
    z = np.concatenate([z, z_])
    x = np.concatenate([x, x_])
    y = np.concatenate([y, y_])

Z = z.reshape(n*10, -1)
X = x.reshape(n*10, -1)

import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame(dict(y=y, x=x, z=z))
sns.pairplot(df, height=1.5, y_vars=["y", "x"])

# Generate Data
import numpy as np
n = 500
np.random.seed(0)
b_zx = 0.5
b_xy = 0.8
z = np.random.uniform(low=0, high=100, size=n)
u = np.random.normal(scale=10, size=n) # unobserved variable
x = u + b_zx * z + np.random.normal(scale=5, size=n) # Z -> X
y = u + b_xy * x + np.random.normal(size=n) # X -> Y; U -> {X, Y}

X = x.reshape(n, -1)
Z = z.reshape(n, -1)


import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame(dict(y=y, x=x, z=z, u=u, e=e))
sns.pairplot(df, height=1.5, y_vars=["y", "x"])

# IV
z2y = np.linalg.inv(Z.T @ Z) @ (Z.T @ y)
z2x = np.linalg.inv(Z.T @ Z) @ (Z.T @ x)
z2y / z2x

from linearmodels.iv import IV2SLS
model = IV2SLS.from_formula("y ~ [x ~ z]", df).fit()
model
